title: v0idk Textures
description: Default textures for v0idk. Contains low fire, low shield, dark mode, transparent inventory, and other custom overlay elements.
body:
v0idk Textures


Contains low fire, low shield, dark mode, transparent inventory, no pumpkin/spyglass overlay, and more!



Full list of features

  • Block side textures (ex. grass texture on the side of a grass block instead of dirt texture on the side of a grass block)
  • Better panoramas
  • Better wither hearts
  • Ping color indicator
  • Numbered hotbar
  • Smoother font
  • Numbered hotbar
  • No pumpkin overlay
  • Unobtrusive rain, snow, and particles
  • Clear banner patterns
  • Age 25 kelp
  • Buddin amethyst borders
  • Arabic numerals
  • Directional dispensers, droppers, hoppers, & observers
  • Visual waxed copper item texture
  • Suspicious sand/gravel borders
  • Ore borders
  • Different stems
  • Better levers
  • Visual infested stone item texture
  • Sticky piston side texture
  • Visible tripwires
  • Brewing guide
  • Clean redstone dust
  • Splash bottle of enchanting
  • Vertical nuggets
  • Glass windows on (trap)doors
  • Literal gamerule names
  • Fixes:
    • Fog effect fixes
    • Item stitching fix
    • Hoe fixes
    • XP orb fixes
    • Beacon beam fixes
    • Better spectator item textures
    • Consistent pots
    • Better toast textures
    • Small/big dripleaf stem fix
    • Double slab fix
    • Blaze rod fix
    • Soul soil in soul campfire (adds soul soil to the bottom of a campfire with soul fire)
    • Cactus fix
    • Better fast leaves
    • Better break particles
    • Better observer texture
    • Tripwire fix
    • Sign fix
    • Better hanging sign texure
    • Bowl eating particle fix
    • Item holding fix
  • Visual...
    • Redstone power levels
    • Note block pitch
    • Sapling growth
    • Composter stages
    • Cauldron stages
    • Honey stages
  • 3D...
    • Skulk veins
    • Sun & moon
    • Fungi
    • Lily pads
    • Stonecutters
    • Glow lichen
    • Vines
    • Ladders
    • Rails
    • Sugar cane
    • Iron bars
    • Chains
    • Chiseled bookshelves
    • Bookshelves
    • Trapdoors
    • Redstone wire
    • Items
    • Doors
  • Quieter...
    • Cave sounds
    • Pistons
    • Minecarts
    • Thunder
    • Water
    • Nether portals
    • Rain
    • Snow golems
    • Squids
    • Striders
    • Ender dragon
    • Goats
    • Chickens
    • Cows
    • Llamas
    • Pigs
    • Iron golems
    • Sheep
    • Zombies
    • Villagers
  • Variated...
    • Stone
    • Terracotta
    • Unpolished stones
    • Sunflowers (rotation)
    • Planks
    • Gravel
    • End stone
    • Red mushroom blocks
    • Birch logs
    • Dirt
    • Coarse dirt
    • Cobblestone
    • Moss
    • Bricks
    • Bookshelves
    • Grass
